title: Assistant Store Manager - Hypercity Advisory Limited - Top MNC

jsonLd.title: Assistant Store Manager - Hypercity Advisory Limited - Top MNC
jsonLd.description:
Hypercity Advisory Limited is actively seeking a talented and motivated Assistant Store Manager to join our dynamic team in Indore. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Hypercity Advisory Limited:
Hypercity Advisory Limited is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage
• Maintain high standards of store hygiene and cleanliness
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty
• Prepare daily sales reports and share insights with management
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Customer Service
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in KPI Management
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Shrinkage Control
• Proficiency in Loss Prevention
• Proficiency in Loyalty Programs
• Proficiency in Retail Analytics

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Professional development and training programs
• Annual performance appraisal
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Indore, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Hypercity Advisory Limited!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
